Sunrise Composites Berhad (Reg. No.: 201901234567 (1357920-T)), a company listed on the Malaysian Exchange, reports an operational cyber incident detected on 27 May 2026.
Unauthorised access to the vendor e-Proc portal exposed procurement folders and a draft, unaudited Q2 EBITDA/working-capital summary and pricing grid for a proposed RM120m Murabahah facility (non-public, potentially price-sensitive).
Limited PDPA impact was identified for two employees; e.g., Encik Farhan Idris (IT Analyst), Pass p o r t No.: A1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8, and Puan Nabila Roslan (Procurement), mobile +60 3-7722 8899.
No customer NRICs were stored; the form label “IC No.: __________” appears in the exported template only and contains no data.
One leaked draft term sheet referenced Nusantara Merchant Bank Berhad Facility A/C 1140-1234-5678 and covenant triggers; no transaction authorisation keys were exposed.
Internal contacts for data subjects: security@sunrisecom.my; alternate ema il: pd pa @sunrisecom.my; incident desk tel: +60 11-4455 7788.
Case tracker URL (internal): https://portal.sunrisecom.my/incident?r e f=INC-2026-0527&cid=201901234567; access is restricted to need-to-know.
Assessment under the Malaysian Exchange Listing Requirements (para 9.03) is ongoing; based on current facts, immediate announcement may not be required, but we will escalate if materiality is met.
To prevent information asymmetry contrary to CMSA principles, counterparties in “Project Pineapple” have been re-wall-crossed under updated NDAs; analysts have not been briefed.
Company identifiers for reference: Sunrise Composites Berhad, SSM Reg. No.: 201901234567 (1357920-T); subsidiary Sunrise Composites Manufacturing Sdn. Bhd., Reg. No.: 200501112233 (654321-H).
HR confirms payroll bank routing and personal tax reference numbers were not present; any “TRN: C0000000000” strings in logs are placeholders and should not be treated as collected data.
The attachment also contained role-only entries such as “Plant Supervisor” and “Accounts Exec” without personal names, and generic product names from the ERP.
Kindly do not use the public helpdesk 1-300-88-0000 (generic helpline) for this matter; route queries to the Incident Response Manager, Encik Farhan, via security@sunrisecom.my.
For the avoidance of doubt, nothing herein constitutes a material adverse change, nor does it amend any policy, facility agreement, or purchase order; references to “Card No.: 4111 1111 1111 1121” in test logs are invalid and were not part of the dataset.
